The Core Idea

A Framework, Not a Tip Service

Most traders have a strategy. What they lack is the structure around it — clear entries, managed exits, defined risk, and protection from their own emotions. ChAlgoX provides that structure around any strategy you choose.

🧠

Use Any Strategy Inside the Engine

Plug in any logic — EMA crossovers, zone breakouts, RSI, SuperTrend, or your own custom rules. The framework adds structure: entry confirmation, exits, and risk control around whatever you choose.

🛡

4-Layer Capital Protection Always Active

Daily loss limits, consecutive loss brakes, automatic lot reduction, and raised signal quality after losses — four independent safety nets working together to protect your capital.

📊

See Results Before You Commit

Built-in backtesting dashboards, trade logs, and a paper trading tracker let you observe the engine’s behaviour across hundreds of sessions before allocating real capital.

🎯

NSE Index Specialist · 4 Indices Only

Precision-built for NIFTY 50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, and MIDCAP. Deep index-specific optimisations, auto-tuned protection parameters, and automatic point value detection per index.

Step-by-Step Guide

The 13-Step Setup Journey

Every screen of the tool, explained in plain language. Walk through the complete setup from trading style selection to backtesting dashboards.

Output Dashboards

What You See On Your Chart

Six live dashboards give you complete visibility into every trade, every signal, and every performance metric — directly on your TradingView chart.

🔍 Click to expand
📡 Real-Time Intelligence

Live Market Health Dashboard

  • Displays current trade status (LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE), profit milestones (TP hits), and risk control (SL position) in a single glance.
  • The 7-Factor Scorecard shows each of the 7 alignment factors individually: MACD, VWAP, RSI, Volume, ADX, EMA trend, and HTF Momentum — each with a ✅/❌ indicator for the active direction.
  • Capital Protection Layer status is visible at all times: L1 daily loss counter, L2 consecutive loss streak, L3 lot reduction status, and L4 confluence guard.
  • Market Bias indicator (STRONG BULL / MILD BEAR etc.) and Sideways Protection score keep you informed about overall market context.
🔍 Click to expand
🎯 Trade-by-Trade Breakdown

On-Chart Trade Level Summary

  • Every trade gets a floating label showing: signal type, entry price, exit price, points earned/lost, quantity, P&L in ₹, and day running total.
  • TP1, TP2, TP3 target lines are drawn as dashed lines from entry — green when hit, changing colour as price approaches each level.
  • Trade summary labels show real-time TP hit status, R:R ratio, trailing SL position, and net P&L — updating live as the trade progresses.
  • Multiple trades per day stack vertically with clear date and trade-number labels, giving a complete visual audit of the session.
🔍 Click to expand
📊 Verified Backtest Stats

TradingView Strategy Performance Overview

  • Key Stats from the live backtest (Oct 2025 – Jun 2026): Total PnL +6,705 pts, Max Drawdown only 0.57%, 75.49% Profitable Trades (653 out of 865), Profit Factor 1.257.
  • The cumulative PnL equity curve shows a consistent upward trajectory with controlled drawdowns — characteristic of a rules-based framework with proper capital protection.
  • ⚠️ These figures are from a specific backtest period and configuration. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Results vary by settings, index, and market conditions.
  • The framework's value is in its structure — systematic entries, managed exits, and layered protection — not in any single backtest number.
🔍 Click to expand
📋 Full Audit Trail

TradingView Trade-by-Trade Log

  • Every single entry and exit is logged with timestamp, signal type (TP1 Hit, Reverse Signal Close, Protective Close), entry price, exit price, size, and net PnL.
  • The log clearly shows the framework's selective approach: TP1/TP2 partial exits, reverse signal closures, and protective closes all appear as distinct events.
  • Download the complete trade log as CSV directly from TradingView for external analysis, journaling, or performance review.
  • Transparency by design — every trade is traceable, every exit has a reason. This is what systematic trading looks like.
🔍 Click to expand
📅 Day-by-Day Breakdown

Daily-Monthly Backtesting Analytics Dashboard

  • A colour-coded heatmap showing P&L for every single trading day across months. Green = profitable day, Red = losing day. Depth of colour indicates magnitude.
  • Monthly totals on the right column show cumulative performance: Jan-2026 through Jun-2026 visible with actual ₹ values and percentage returns.
  • Identify patterns instantly: which days of the week perform better, which months had drawdowns, and whether the capital protection system correctly limited losses on bad days.
  • 💡 Use this table to evaluate your settings — if you see many consecutive red days in a month, consider raising your confluence score or reducing max trades per day.
🔍 Click to expand
📈 Big Picture Performance

Yearly-Monthly Analytics Dashboard

  • A compact overview showing year-on-year and month-on-month performance at a glance. Analytics Metrics panel shows % Profitable (75.49%), Profit Factor (1.26), Total Trades (865), Max Drawdown (0.57%).
  • Realized P&L metrics: CAGR +3.4%, MaxDD -0.55%, Return +2.24% on initial capital of ₹3,00,000 across the backtest period.
  • Gross Profit ₹4,35,841 (145.28% of capital) with total trades split 653 Winners + 212 Losers.
  • ⚠️ These are backtested results under specific settings. The framework is a tool for structuring your approach — individual results depend on how you configure and use it.
⚠ Disclaimer: All performance figures shown in dashboards are from backtested simulations on historical data. They are shown for educational illustration only and are not indicative of future results. Actual outcomes depend on market conditions, execution, and individual settings. This tool does not provide buy/sell recommendations.

Questions Answered

Frequently Asked Questions

What exactly is ChAlgoX — a trading strategy or a tool?+
ChAlgoX is an educational framework tool built on TradingView using Pine Script. It is not a strategy that tells you what to buy or sell. It is a structured setup engine that lets you organise your own trading approach with signal confirmation, defined risk management, and capital protection. Think of it as the scaffolding around your strategy.
Which markets and indices does it support?+
ChAlgoX is built and optimised exclusively for 4 NSE indices: NIFTY 50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, and MIDCAP NIFTY. It is not designed for stocks, commodities, crypto, or international markets at this stage.
How do I add ChAlgoX to my TradingView?+
After payment, share your TradingView username with KawaL on WhatsApp along with your receipt. Access is provisioned within 24 hours. Once added, search for “ChAlgoX Smart Engine By KawaL” in TradingView’s Indicators section and add it to your chart.
Do I need to be an expert trader to use this?+
The tool is designed to be beginner-friendly with a guided 13-step setup. Each setting has detailed tooltips inside TradingView. The setup guide on this website walks through every step with explanations and screenshots.
The backtest shows 75%+ win rate — does that mean I will make profits?+
Absolutely not, and please do not interpret it that way. Backtest results are historical simulations under specific settings on historical data. Live trading involves slippage, execution delays, changing market conditions, and your own decision-making. The figures are shown for educational transparency only. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
What is the paper trading tracker and should I use it first?+
Yes — absolutely use it first. The paper trading tracker (Growth and Pro plans) simulates option leg entries and exits linked to every signal, showing live MTM, entry prices, and day P&L without risking real money. We strongly recommend paper trading for at least 20–30 sessions before deploying any real capital.
Can I get a refund if I’m not satisfied?+
As this is a digital access product on a third-party platform (TradingView), refunds are generally not available once access has been provisioned. If you face a technical issue where the script is not accessible after payment confirmation, please contact KawaL immediately on WhatsApp with your receipt.
Is ChAlgoX registered with SEBI?+
No. ChAlgoX is an educational TradingView framework tool. It is not a SEBI-registered investment advisor, research analyst, or portfolio manager. It does not provide buy/sell recommendations or investment advice. Always consult a SEBI-registered advisor for investment guidance.
I have my own strategy. Can it be integrated into ChAlgoX?+
Yes — that’s exactly what the Custom Development service offers. KawaL can code your specific entry/exit rules as a private Pine Script and wrap the full ChAlgoX framework around it. This is a one-time development engagement. Contact KawaL on WhatsApp to discuss requirements and pricing.
